controls.control_objective: To ensure 3, 2000, on foreign exchange management (establishment in india of branch or office or other place of business) regulation was repealed and replaced b
controls.control_description: FEMA 22/2000-RB dated May 3, 2000, on Foreign Exchange Management (establishment in India of Branch or office or other place of business) Regulation was repealed and replaced by Notification No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 3, 2000, on foreign exchange management (establishment in india of branch or office or other place of business) regulation was repealed and replaced b

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue directions to authorised persons through a
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that, whenever necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to
Authorised Persons through A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue directions to authorised persons through a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amended suitably simultaneously
controls.control_description:
The Master Direction issued
herewith shall be amended suitably simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amended suitably simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered by the ad category-i bank as per the guidelines given by reserve bank of india (rbi)
controls.control_description:
Applications from foreign companies (a body corporate incorporated outside
India, including a firm or other association of individuals) for establishing
BO/ LO/ PO in India shall be considered by the AD Category-I bank as per
the guidelines given by Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be considered by the ad category-i bank as per the guidelines given by reserve bank of india (rbi)

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of reserve bank of india and shall be forwarded by the ad category-i bank to the general manager, reserve bank of india, centra
controls.control_description:
An application from a person resident outside India for opening of a
BO/LO/PO in India shall require prior approval of Reserve Bank of India and
shall be forwarded by the AD Category-I bank to the General Manager,
Reserve Bank of India, Central Office Cell, Foreign Exchange Department,
6, Sansad Marg, New Delhi - 110 001 who shall process the applications in
consultation with the Government of India, in the following cases:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of reserve bank of india and shall be forwarded by the ad category-i bank to the general manager, reserve bank of india, centra

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required in cases where government approval or license/permission by the concerned ministry/regulator has already been granted
controls.control_description:
However, prior approval of Reserve Bank of India shall not be required in
cases where Government approval or license/permission by the
concerned Ministry/Regulator has already been granted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required in cases where government approval or license/permission by the concerned ministry/regulator has already been granted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required if the said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/ entered into an agreement with ministry of defence or service headquart
controls.control_description: In the case of proposal for opening a PO relating to defence sector, no separate reference or approval of Government of India shall be required if the said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/ entered into an agreement with Ministry of Defence or Service Headquarters or Defence Public Sector Undertakings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required if the said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/ entered into an agreement with ministry of defence or service headquart

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required if the said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/ entered into an agreement with ministry of defence or service headquart
controls.control_description:
No separate approval is required from Reserve Bank of India for such cases only."
case of proposal for opening a PO relating to defence sector, no
separate reference or approval of Government of India shall be required
if the said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/
entered into an agreement with Ministry of Defence or Service
Headquarters or Defence Public Sector Undertakings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required if the said non-resident applicant has been awarded a contract by/ entered into an agreement with ministry of defence or service headquart

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek permission under fema 22(r)3
controls.control_description:
However, if such entity is engaged, partly or wholly, in any of the
activities covered under Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Act, 2010
(FCRA), they shall obtain a certificate of registration under the said Act
and shall not seek permission under FEMA 22(R)3.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek permission under fema 22(r)3

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a financially sound track record viz: a
controls.control_description:
The non-resident entity applying for a BO/LO in India should have a
financially sound track record viz:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a financially sound track record viz: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a letter of comfort (loc) (annex a) from its parent/ group company
controls.control_description:
An applicant that is not financially sound and is a subsidiary of another
company may submit a Letter of Comfort (LOC) (Annex A) from its parent/
group company, subject to the condition that the parent/ group company
satisfies the prescribed criteria for net worth and profit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a letter of comfort (loc) (annex a) from its parent/ group company

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the non-resident entity in form fnc (annex b) to a designated ad category - i bank (i
controls.control_description:
The application for establishing BO / LO/ PO in India may be submitted by
the non-resident entity in Form FNC (Annex B) to a designated AD Category
- I bank (i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the non-resident entity in form fnc (annex b) to a designated ad category - i bank (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure after exercising due diligence in respect of the applicant's background, and satisfying itself as regards adherence to the eligibility criteria for es
controls.control_description:
The
AD Category-I bank shall after exercising due diligence in respect of the
applicant's background, and satisfying itself as regards adherence to the
eligibility criteria for establishing BO/LO/PO, antecedents of the promoter,
nature and location of activity of the applicant, sources of funds, etc., and
compliance with the extant KYC norms grant approval to the foreign entity
for establishing BO/LO/PO in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to after exercising due diligence in respect of the applicant's background, and satisfying itself as regards adherence to the eligibility criteria for es

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame appropriate policy for dealing with these applications in conformity with the fema regulations and directions
controls.control_description:
The AD Category-I banks may frame
appropriate policy for dealing with these applications in conformity with the
FEMA Regulations and Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame appropriate policy for dealing with these applications in conformity with the fema regulations and directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure forward a copy of the form fnc along with the details of the approval proposed to be granted by it to the general manager, reserve bank of india, co c
controls.control_description:
However, before issuing the approval letter to the applicant, the AD
Category-I bank shall forward a copy of the Form FNC along with the details
of the approval proposed to be granted by it to the General Manager,
Reserve Bank of India, CO Cell, New Delhi, for allotment of Unique
Identification Number (UIN) to each BO/LO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to forward a copy of the form fnc along with the details of the approval proposed to be granted by it to the general manager, reserve bank of india, co c

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue the approval letter to the non-resident entity for establishing bo/lo in india
controls.control_description:
After receipt of the UIN from
the Reserve Bank, the AD Category-I bank shall issue the approval letter to
the non-resident entity for establishing BO/LO in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue the approval letter to the non-resident entity for establishing bo/lo in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure have secured the necessary regulatory clearances
controls.control_description:
Also, the project must have secured the
necessary regulatory clearances;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have secured the necessary regulatory clearances

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the designated ad category i bank as to the date on which the bo/lo/po has been set up
controls.control_description:
An applicant that has received a permission for setting up of a BO/LO/PO
shall inform the designated AD Category I bank as to the date on which the
BO/LO/PO has been set up.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the designated ad category i bank as to the date on which the bo/lo/po has been set up

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform reserve bank accordingly
controls.control_description:
The AD Category I bank in turn shall inform
Reserve Bank accordingly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform reserve bank accordingly

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform rbi accordingly
controls.control_description:
In case an approval granted by the AD bank has
either been surrendered by the applicant or has expired without any
BO/LO/PO being set up, the AD Category I bank shall inform RBI
accordingly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform rbi accordingly

controls.control_objective: To ensure lapse
controls.control_description:
The approval granted by the AD Category I bank should include a proviso to
the effect that in case the BO/LO/PO for which approval has been granted is
not opened within six months from the date of the approval letter, the
approval shall lapse.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lapse

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider granting extension of time for a further period of six months for setting up the office
controls.control_description:
In cases where the non-resident entity is not able to
open the office within the stipulated time frame due to reasons beyond its
control, the AD Category-I bank may consider granting extension of time for
a further period of six months for setting up the office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider granting extension of time for a further period of six months for setting up the office

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the prior approval of reserve bank of india in this regard
controls.control_description:
Any further extension
of time shall require the prior approval of Reserve Bank of India in this
regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the prior approval of reserve bank of india in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach an ad category - i bank with the documents as mentioned in para 10 under "closure of liaison / branch office"
controls.control_description:
In the event of winding-up of business and for remittance of winding-up
proceeds, the branch shall approach an AD Category - I bank with the
documents as mentioned in para 10 under "Closure of Liaison / Branch
Office".
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach an ad category - i bank with the documents as mentioned in para 10 under "closure of liaison / branch office"

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the designated ad category i bank in india to open an account to receive remittances from its head office outside india
controls.control_description:
An LO may approach the designated AD Category I Bank in India to open
an account to receive remittances from its Head Office outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the designated ad category i bank in india to open an account to receive remittances from its head office outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain more than one bank account at any given time without the prior permission of reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
It may
be noted that an LO shall not maintain more than one bank account at any
given time without the prior permission of Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain more than one bank account at any given time without the prior permission of reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be: a
controls.control_description:
The
permitted Credits and Debits to the account shall be:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach any ad category-i bank in india to open an account for its operations in india
controls.control_description:
A BO may approach any AD Category-I Bank in India to open an account
for its operations in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach any ad category-i bank in india to open an account for its operations in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure represent the funds received from head office through normal banking channels for meeting the expenses of the office and any legitimate receivables ar
controls.control_description:
Credits to the account should represent the funds
received from Head Office through normal banking channels for meeting the
expenses of the office and any legitimate receivables arising in the process
of its business operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to represent the funds received from head office through normal banking channels for meeting the expenses of the office and any legitimate receivables ar

controls.control_objective: To ensure be for the expenses incurred by the bo and towards remittance of profit/winding up proceeds
controls.control_description:
Debits to this account shall be for the expenses
incurred by the BO and towards remittance of profit/winding up proceeds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be for the expenses incurred by the bo and towards remittance of profit/winding up proceeds

controls.control_objective: To ensure open a bank account without any prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Any foreign entity except an entity from Pakistan who has been awarded a
contract for a project by the Government authority/Public Sector
Undertakings or are permitted by the AD to operate in India may open a
bank account without any prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open a bank account without any prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure need prior approval of reserve bank of india to open a bank account for its project office in india
controls.control_description:
An entity from
Pakistan shall need prior approval of Reserve Bank of India to open a bank
account for its project office in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to need prior approval of reserve bank of india to open a bank account for its project office in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be payment of project related expenditure and credits shall be foreign currency receipts from the project sanctioning authority and remittances from p
controls.control_description:
The permissible debits to the account shall be payment of project
related expenditure and credits shall be foreign currency receipts
from the Project Sanctioning Authority and remittances from
parent/group company abroad or bilateral / multilateral international
financing agency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be payment of project related expenditure and credits shall be foreign currency receipts from the project sanctioning authority and remittances from p

controls.control_objective: To ensure rest solely with the ad category-i bank
controls.control_description:
The responsibility of ensuring that only the approved debits and
credits are allowed in the foreign currency account shall rest solely
with the AD Category-I bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to rest solely with the ad category-i bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to 100 per cent scrutiny by the concurrent auditor of the respective ad category-i bank
controls.control_description:
Further, the accounts shall be subject
to 100 per cent scrutiny by the Concurrent Auditor of the respective
AD Category-I bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to 100 per cent scrutiny by the concurrent auditor of the respective ad category-i bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure scrutinize the aacs and ensure that the activities undertaken by the bo/lo are being carried out in accordance with the terms and conditions of the ap
controls.control_description:
The designated AD Category - I bank shall scrutinize the AACs and ensure
that the activities undertaken by the BO/LO are being carried out in
accordance with the terms and conditions of the approval given.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to scrutinize the aacs and ensure that the activities undertaken by the bo/lo are being carried out in accordance with the terms and conditions of the ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately be reported to the general manager, reserve bank of india, co cell, new delhi, along with the copy of the aac and their comments thereon
controls.control_description:
In the event
of any adverse findings reported by the auditor or noticed by the designated
AD Category -I bank, the same should immediately be reported to the
General Manager, Reserve Bank of India, CO Cell, New Delhi, along with
the copy of the AAC and their comments thereon.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately be reported to the general manager, reserve bank of india, co cell, new delhi, along with the copy of the aac and their comments thereon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted before the expiry of the validity of the approval, to the ad category-i bank concerned under whose jurisdiction the lo/nodal office is lo
controls.control_description:
Requests for extension of time for LOs may be submitted before the
expiry of the validity of the approval, to the AD Category-I bank
concerned under whose jurisdiction the LO/nodal office is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted before the expiry of the validity of the approval, to the ad category-i bank concerned under whose jurisdiction the lo/nodal office is lo

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend the validity period of lo/s for a period of 3 years from the date of expiry of the original approval / extension granted if the applicant has c
controls.control_description:
The
designated AD Category - I bank may extend the validity period of LO/s
for a period of 3 years from the date of expiry of the original approval /
extension granted if the applicant has complied with the following
conditions and the application is otherwise in order:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend the validity period of lo/s for a period of 3 years from the date of expiry of the original approval / extension granted if the applicant has c

controls.control_objective: To ensure have submitted the annual activity certificates for the previous years and b
controls.control_description:
The LO should have submitted the Annual Activity Certificates
for the previous years and
b.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have submitted the annual activity certificates for the previous years and b

controls.control_objective: To ensure update the information on its website immediately
controls.control_description:
Reserve Bank
shall update the information on its website immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to update the information on its website immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to either close down or be converted into a joint venture / wholly owned subsidiary in conformity with the extant foreign direct investment polic
controls.control_description:
Upon expiry of the validity
period, the offices shall have to either close down or be converted into a
Joint Venture / Wholly Owned Subsidiary in conformity with the extant
Foreign Direct Investment policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to either close down or be converted into a joint venture / wholly owned subsidiary in conformity with the extant foreign direct investment polic

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to register with the state police authorities
controls.control_description:
Registration with police authorities
Applicants from Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Afghanistan, Iran, China, Hong Kong,
Macau or Pakistan desirous of opening BO/LO/PO in India shall have to register
with the state police authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to register with the state police authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be marked by the ad category-i bank to the ministry of home affairs, internal security division-i, government of india, new delhi for necessary action
controls.control_description:
Copy of approval letter for 'persons' from these
countries shall be marked by the AD Category-I bank to the Ministry of Home
Affairs, Internal Security Division-I, Government of India, New Delhi for necessary
action and record.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be marked by the ad category-i bank to the ministry of home affairs, internal security division-i, government of india, new delhi for necessary action

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the ad category-i bank in a fresh fnc form
controls.control_description:
Requests for establishing additional BOs / LOs may be submitted to the AD
Category-I bank in a fresh FNC form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the ad category-i bank in a fresh fnc form

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of rbi
controls.control_description:
East, West, North and South), the applicant has to justify the need for
additional office/s and it shall require prior approval of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify one of its offices in india as the nodal office, which will coordinate the activities of all of its offices in india
controls.control_description:
The applicant may identify one of its offices in India as the Nodal Office,
which will coordinate the activities of all of its offices in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify one of its offices in india as the nodal office, which will coordinate the activities of all of its offices in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure if the lo/bo is shifted to another place in the same city subject to the condition that the new address is intimated to the designated ad category-i b
controls.control_description:
However, no
permission is required if the LO/BO is shifted to another place in the
same city subject to the condition that the new address is intimated to
the designated AD Category-I bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to if the lo/bo is shifted to another place in the same city subject to the condition that the new address is intimated to the designated ad category-i b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be intimated to the co cell, new delhi by the ad category-i bank at the earliest
controls.control_description:
Changes in the postal address may
be intimated to the CO Cell, New Delhi by the AD Category-I bank at the
earliest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be intimated to the co cell, new delhi by the ad category-i bank at the earliest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the applicant to the reserve bank through the designated ad category -i bank justifying the need
controls.control_description:
Requests for undertaking activities in addition to what has been permitted
initially (Annex C) by Reserve Bank of India/ AD Category-I bank may be
submitted by the applicant to the Reserve Bank through the designated AD
Category -I bank justifying the need.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the applicant to the reserve bank through the designated ad category -i bank justifying the need

controls.control_objective: To ensure , based on their business prudence, board approved policy and compliance to extant rules/regulations stipulated by dbr, rbi extend fund/non-fund based
controls.control_description:
Extension of fund and non-fund based facilities
AD Category-I bank, may, based on their business prudence, Board approved
policy and compliance to extant rules/regulations stipulated by DBR, RBI extend
fund/non-fund based facilities to BOs/POs only.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , based on their business prudence, board approved policy and compliance to extant rules/regulations stipulated by dbr, rbi extend fund/non-fund based

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the designated ad category - i bank by the bo/ lo/ po or their nodal office, as the case may be
controls.control_description:
Requests for closure of the BO / LO/ PO and allowing the remittance of
winding up proceeds of BO / LO/ PO may be submitted to the designated
AD Category - I bank by the BO/ LO/ PO or their nodal office, as the case
may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the designated ad category - i bank by the bo/ lo/ po or their nodal office, as the case may be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted along with the following documents: a
controls.control_description:
The application for winding up may be submitted along with the
following documents:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted along with the following documents: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow remittance of winding up proceeds in respect of offices of banks and insurance companies, after obtaining copies of permission of closure from t
controls.control_description:
Designated AD Category-I bank may allow remittance of winding up
proceeds in respect of offices of banks and insurance companies, after
obtaining copies of permission of closure from the sectoral regulators
along with the documents mentioned above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow remittance of winding up proceeds in respect of offices of banks and insurance companies, after obtaining copies of permission of closure from t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered by the ad category-i bank only from bos/los/pos who are adhering to the operational guidelines such as submission of aacs (up to the cur
controls.control_description:
Transfer of assets of BO/LO/PO
Proposals for transfer of assets may be considered by the AD Category-I bank
only from BOs/LOs/POs who are adhering to the operational guidelines such as
submission of AACs (up to the current financial year) at regular annual intervals
with copies endorsed to DGIT (International Taxation);
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be considered by the ad category-i bank only from bos/los/pos who are adhering to the operational guidelines such as submission of aacs (up to the cur

controls.control_objective: To ensure also confirm that the assets were not re-valued after their initial acquisition
controls.control_description:
Statutory
Auditor should also confirm that the assets were not re-valued after their
initial acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also confirm that the assets were not re-valued after their initial acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than the book value in each case
controls.control_description:
The sale consideration should not be more than the
book value in each case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than the book value in each case

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been acquired by the bo/lo/po from inward remittances and no intangible assets such as good will, pre-operative expenses should be included
controls.control_description:
The assets should have been acquired by the BO/LO/PO from inward
remittances and no intangible assets such as good will, pre-operative
expenses should be included.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been acquired by the bo/lo/po from inward remittances and no intangible assets such as good will, pre-operative expenses should be included

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure payment of all applicable taxes while permitting transfer of assets
controls.control_description:
AD Category-I bank must ensure payment of all applicable taxes while
permitting transfer of assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure payment of all applicable taxes while permitting transfer of assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted by the ad category-i banks after satisfying itself about the bonafides of the transaction
controls.control_description:
to NGOs or other not-for-profit organisations may be
permitted by the AD category-I banks after satisfying itself about the
bonafides of the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted by the ad category-i banks after satisfying itself about the bonafides of the transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain permanent account number (pan) from the income tax authorities on setting up of their office in india and report the same in the aacs
controls.control_description:
The BOs / LOs shall obtain Permanent Account Number (PAN) from the
Income Tax Authorities on setting up of their office in India and report the
same in the AACs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to obtain permanent account number (pan) from the income tax authorities on setting up of their office in india and report the same in the aacs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for the due diligence and kyc norms of the bo/lo/po
controls.control_description:
Each BO/ LO/PO are required to transact through one designated AD
Category-I bank only who shall be responsible for the due diligence and
KYC norms of the BO/LO/PO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for the due diligence and kyc norms of the bo/lo/po

controls.control_objective: To ensure to transact through their designated ad
controls.control_description:
BO /LO/PO, present in multiple locations,
are required to transact through their designated AD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to transact through their designated ad

controls.control_objective: To ensure to comply with all the reporting norms
controls.control_description:
However, the AD
of the nodal office is required to comply with all the reporting norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to comply with all the reporting norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the guidelines issued under foreign exchange management (acquisition and transfer of immovable property outside india) regulations
controls.control_description:
Acquisition of property by BO/PO shall be governed by the guidelines
issued under Foreign Exchange Management (Acquisition and transfer
of immovable property outside India) Regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be governed by the guidelines issued under foreign exchange management (acquisition and transfer of immovable property outside india) regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended to shipping/airline companies
controls.control_description:
However, such facility may
not be extended to shipping/airline companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended to shipping/airline companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach their ad category-i bank to regularise their offices under fema 1999, even if permission of reserve bank was not required as per the regulati
controls.control_description:
In case a BO/LO has been established and continues to exist without
approval of the Reserve Bank, such BO/LO may approach their AD
Category-I bank to regularise their offices under FEMA 1999, even if
permission of Reserve Bank was not required as per the regulations
existing at the time of setting up of the office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach their ad category-i bank to regularise their offices under fema 1999, even if permission of reserve bank was not required as per the regulati

controls.control_objective: To ensure be brought to the notice of reserve bank immediately for allotment of uin
controls.control_description:
Such cases may be
brought to the notice of Reserve Bank immediately for allotment of UIN.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be brought to the notice of reserve bank immediately for allotment of uin

controls.control_objective: To ensure also approach their ad category-i bank with a copy of the said approval for allotment of a uin by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
The foreign entities who may have established LO or BO with the
permission from the Government of India in the pre-FEMA period shall
also approach their AD Category-I bank with a copy of the said approval
for allotment of a UIN by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also approach their ad category-i bank with a copy of the said approval for allotment of a uin by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted by the ad category-i bank only if the non-resident entity changes its name without change in ownership and if the application to this eff
controls.control_description:
Change in the name of the existing LO/BO may be permitted by the AD
Category-I bank only if the non-resident entity changes its name without
change in ownership and if the application to this effect is received with
the Board resolution for change of name and documents/certificate from
ROC India showing change of name.

FDI policies and hence the approvals given to one foreign entity is not
transferrable to another foreign entity.

controls.control_objective: To ensure stand withdrawn without any further notice
controls.control_description:
We will not undertake either partly or fully, any activity that is
covered under Foreign Contribution Regulation Act, 2010 (FCRA) and we
understand that any misrepresentation made or false information furnished by us in
this behalf would render the approval granted under the Foreign Exchange
Management (Establishment in India of a branch office or liaison office or a project
office or any other place of business) Regulations, 2016, automatically as void ab
initio and such approval by the Reserve Bank shall stand withdrawn without any
further notice.4
iii.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to stand withdrawn without any further notice
